subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-07-25
subcodes.first_line: I am very happy to greet you here today. This is the second time the breeze of God has wafted
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @idle talk; backbiting; speaking ill of others, @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within
